steps: Go to https://www.udemy.com and log in to your Udemy account
Click 'Create API client' and fill in the required details about your application
Submit the request and wait for approval from Udemy
Once approved, your Client ID and Client Secret will be visible on the API Clients page
Use Base64-encoded 'ClientID:ClientSecret' as a Basic auth header for all API requests

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key (Client ID:Client Secret, Base64-encoded)
credential_fields.description: Base64-encoded string of 'ClientID:ClientSecret' used in the Authorization: Basic header

notes: WARNING: The Udemy Affiliate API was discontinued on January 1, 2025
The Instructor API remains available to Udemy instructors
Authentication uses HTTP Basic auth: base64(ClientID:ClientSecret)
API access requires manual approval from Udemy
The API is read-only for course catalog browsing (search, details, reviews)

test_endpoint.description: List courses from the Udemy catalog
